mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, cluster_id, worker_ip, cloud_or_idc_name, region, worker_state, physic_mem_mb, physic_core_num, physic_disk_gb, cpu_use_ratio, mem_use_ratio, free_mem_mb, free_disk_gb, session_pool_use, session_pool_max, worker_load, schedule_ip, worker_name, worker_seq_number, worker_desc, install_console_job_id, uninstall_console_job_id, upgrade_all_console_job_id, deploy_status, external_ip, uid, console_job_id, life_cycle_state, install_or_upgrade_date, install_or_upgrade_version
id, cluster_id, region, worker_state, schedule_ip, worker_name, worker_seq_number, worker_desc, uid
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE worker_state = #{workerState,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.api.console.status.WorkerState} AND schedule_ip = #{scheduleIp} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE cluster_id = #{clusterId} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE id IN #{item} AND cluster_id = #{clusterId} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE cluster_id IN #{item} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE cluster_id = #{clusterId} AND worker_ip = #{workerIp} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE cluster_id = #{clusterId} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC

SELECT
FROM dm_worker WHERE id = #{workerId} AND total_task_mem_mb = #{totalTaskMemMb} for update
mapper.update: UPDATE dm_worker SET install_console_job_id = #{installConsoleJobId}, uninstall_console_job_id = #{uninstallConsoleJobId}, upgrade_all_console_job_id= #{upgradeAllConsoleJobId} WHERE id = #{workerId}

UPDATE dm_worker
physic_mem_mb = #{physicMemMb},
physic_core_num = #{physicCoreNum},
physic_disk_gb = #{physicDiskGb},
cpu_use_ratio = #{cpuUseRatio},
mem_use_ratio = #{memUseRatio},
worker_load = #{workerLoad},
free_disk_gb = #{freeDiskGb},
free_mem_mb = #{freeMemMb},
session_pool_use = #{sessionPoolUse},
session_pool_max = #{sessionPoolMax},
WHERE id = #{workerId}
UPDATE dm_worker SET install_or_upgrade_date = #{installOrUpgradeDate}, install_or_upgrade_version = #{installOrUpgradeVersion} WHERE id = #{workerId}
